results.title: High Court upholds Gnanasara Thera’s nine-month jail term
results.description: Colombo High Court Judge Manjula Thilakaratne today rejected the appeal filed by Bodu Bala Sena General Secretary Ven. Galagodaaththe Gnanasara Thera and upheld the nine-month rigorous imprisonment sentence imposed by the Colombo Magistrate’s Court.

results.title: Flag Torn. Temple Mocked. Idol Targeted. Why Texas Has Become Ground Zero For Rising Anti-India Hate
results.description: A flag torn in broad daylight. A temple mocked online. A Ganesha idol removed on a realtor's advice. And a crowd cheering a man screaming "Go back to India" outside a Texas city hall. This is Frisco, one of the most prosperous Indian-American communities in the United States, and now the epicentre of a frightening surge in anti-India, anti-Hindu hostility. For months, MAGA-aligned influencers have been turning Frisco into a national flashpoint, framing Indian immigrants as economic invaders and Hindu temples as symbols of foreign takeover. Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi has spoken up. But warnings rarely stop a wave already in motion. This video breaks down how the hate was built, who is building it, and what it means for the millions of Indian-Americans.

results.title: PKR MPs: Give Parliament real vetting power, not just 'right to comment' on public prosecutor
results.description: KUALA LUMPUR: Eight PKR lawmakers have called for a robust parliamentary vetting process in the proposed constitutional amendments to separate the roles of the attorney-general and public prosecutor.

results.title: Local Government’s Kumumanya’s Anti-Corruption Directive Shakes 135 Districts as Jobs Open to All Ugandans
results.description: By Brian Mugenyi Watchdog Uganda (mugenyijj@gmail.com) KAMPALA, UGANDA — The Permanent Secretary for the Ministry of Local Government, Mr. Ben Kumumanya, has intensified the call for public servants to exercise their roles with absolute transparency and integrity. According to a new accountability battle unfolding across Uganda’s local government system, several authorities are moving to eliminate [...] The post Local Government’s Kumumanya’s Anti-Corruption Directive Shakes 135 Districts as Jobs Open to All Ugandans appeared first on Watchdog Uganda .
